query:
INSERT INTO product_reviews (productId, userId, rating, title, content, fit, isVerifiedPurchase, helpfulCount, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 1, 5, 'Classic polo, perfect condition', 'This Tommy Hilfiger polo looks brand new. The navy color is exactly as pictured and the fit is spot on. Great find for the price.', 'true_to_size', 1, 3, NOW() - INTERVAL 12 DAY),
(2, 2, 5, 'Best work pants I have owned', 'These Dickies 874s are in excellent condition. Barely any wear. The khaki color goes with everything and they are super comfortable for all-day wear.', 'true_to_size', 1, 5, NOW() - INTERVAL 10 DAY),
(3, 1, 4, 'Warm and cozy fleece', 'The Patagonia fleece is in great shape. Minor pilling but nothing noticeable. Keeps me warm on cold mornings. Would buy from Urban Refit again.', 'runs_large', 1, 2, NOW() - INTERVAL 8 DAY),
(4, 3, 5, 'Crisp Oxford shirt', 'This Ralph Lauren Oxford is a wardrobe staple. The light blue color is perfect for both casual and semi-formal occasions. Fits perfectly.', 'true_to_size', 1, 4, NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY),
(5, 2, 5, 'Iconic 501s in great condition', 'You cannot go wrong with Levi 501s. These have that perfect broken-in feel without being worn out. The indigo wash is classic. Highly recommend.', 'true_to_size', 1, 8, NOW() - INTERVAL 6 DAY),
(6, 4, 4, 'Solid work jacket', 'The Carhartt jacket is built to last. Has some character from previous wear but that is what makes it authentic. Great for layering.', 'runs_large', 1, 3, NOW() - INTERVAL 5 DAY),
(7, 1, 5, 'Clean Air Force 1s', 'These Nike AF1s are in amazing condition. Barely any creasing on the toe box. The all-white colorway is timeless. Excellent value.', 'true_to_size', 1, 6, NOW() - INTERVAL 4 DAY),
(8, 3, 4, 'Nice fitted cap', 'The New Era Yankees cap is in good condition. The navy color is slightly faded but gives it a vintage look. Fits well.', 'true_to_size', 1, 2, NOW() - INTERVAL 3 DAY),
(1, 4, 4, 'Quality polo shirt', 'Second purchase from Urban Refit. This polo is well-made and the condition exceeded my expectations. The sizing chart was accurate.', 'true_to_size', 1, 1, NOW() - INTERVAL 2 DAY),
(5, 3, 5, 'Perfect vintage denim', 'These 501s have the perfect amount of fade. The quality of vintage Levis is unmatched. Love supporting sustainable fashion.', 'runs_small', 1, 4, NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY);
command:

logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 1: Unknown column 'fit' in 'field list'
